Title: Requires that applications for a charter school shall be approved by the community district education council or board of education and public vote
Summary: Requires that applications for a charter school, renewals of a charter, and relocation of a charter school shall be approved by the community district education council or board of education and public vote prior to submission of such application to the charter entity for approval.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to approval of applications of charter schools
